title: Ryanair unveils £40m investment programme for Glasgow Prestwick

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair unveils £40m investment programme for Glasgow Prestwick. The expansion project will make Prestwick Airport Ryanair's largest European maintenance base.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair unveils £40m investment programme for Glasgow Prestwick
